---
title: "Redrawing the architecture as a data fabric"
description: "The template instantiates an agent and its llm-wiki memory onto a shared data fabric; boxes float above the fabric, tethered by a line and a dot, and the template has instantiate arrows to both."
date: "2026-07-19"
categories: [field-notes, architecture]
draft: true
---

::: {.callout-note title="Status"}
**Design.** The intended approach, not yet implemented.
:::

**What happened.** The redraw sharpened the model: the memory is reachable both by its own agent and via the federation, and the fabric, not the template, is the substrate everything connects through.

**Why it matters.** The template instantiates an agent and its llm-wiki memory onto a shared data fabric; boxes float above the fabric, tethered by a line and a dot, and the template has instantiate arrows to both.

**Details.** Drawn from the wiki's Ecosystem-Architecture. The diagram is an inline SVG in the flyer; the source infographic is the data-fabric appendix.
